forecast_text:
PHZ112-190215-
Kauai Leeward Waters-
340 AM HST Sat Jul 18 2026

.TODAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 7 seconds and south southwest 3 feet
at 13 seconds. Scattered showers this morning. Isolated showers
this afternoon. 
.TONIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 7 seconds and south southwest 3 feet
at 12 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.SUNDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 7 seconds and south 3 feet at
12 seconds. Isolated showers in the afternoon. 
.SUNDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 4 to
6 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 3 feet at
17 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.MONDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots, rising to 20 to
25 knots in the afternoon. Seas 5 to 6 feet. Wave Detail: East
5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at 16 seconds. Isolated
showers. 
.MONDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to
6 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
15 seconds. Scattered showers. 
.TUESDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 5 to 6 feet.
Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds and south 4 feet at
14 seconds. Scattered showers, then numerous showers after
midnight. 
.WEDNESDAY...East winds 15 to 20 knots, rising to 20 to 25 knots
in the afternoon and evening, easing to 15 to 20 knots after
midnight. Seas 5 to 6 feet. Wave Detail: East 5 feet at 6 seconds
and south 4 feet at 13 seconds. Scattered showers.
